releases.description:
# 3.6.30 - Smarter YouTube Note Magic

Note Companion now brings a powerful upgrade to YouTube note-taking! You can instantly generate multiple types of structured notes from YouTube videos—including summaries, key concepts, Q&A, and timestamped outlines. The plugin fetches video transcripts, extracts metadata (like channel and publish date), and auto-tags your notes. All YouTube notes are now cleaner, with clickable timestamps and channel links, and sponsor segments are automatically excluded. These improvements make organizing and learning from YouTube content in your vault easier and more flexible than ever.

## Technical Changes
- Added four new YouTube note templates: summary, key concepts, Q&A, and timestamped outline, each with detailed formatting instructions and metadata extraction.
- Refactored YouTube transcript fetching and formatting: now supports transcript sampling for long videos to fit formatting token budgets, and never stores raw transcripts in the vault.
- Auto-extracts and links YouTube channel names and URLs in note frontmatter and body.
- Clickable timestamps: [MM:SS] and [H:MM:SS] markers in notes are now automatically converted to YouTube deep links.
- Sponsor and ad segments are automatically excluded from all YouTube-generated notes.
- Inbox processing now classifies and formats YouTube notes more robustly, with improved error handling and user notifications.
- Added comprehensive tests for YouTube context extraction, formatting, and post-processing.
- Template restoration and management now includes all new YouTube templates.

# 3.6.29 - Smarter Notifications & Custom AI Controls

This update gives you more control over notifications and AI features in Note Companion. Fine-tune how many inbox notifications you see, choose exactly which file types get processed, and decide if the AI chat can search the web. Plus, you can now turn off automatic backups before formatting, and enjoy a more customizable, less distracting workflow.

## Technical Changes
- Added granular inbox notification levels (silent, error, warning, info, debug) with migration from old settings.
- Inbox notification level is now user-configurable in settings, controlling toast verbosity for file processing.
- New toggles for attachment processing: enable/disable processing for images, audio, PDFs, and YouTube transcript fetching.
- Option to disable automatic file moving to recommended folders after inbox processing.
- Option to disable automatic backup creation before formatting files (applies to inbox, template, and chat formatting).
- AI chat web search can now be toggled on/off in settings and is respected in chat requests.
- Refined media file handling: when processing is disabled, files are moved to bypassed folder and only embedded, not analyzed.
- Improved error handling and user feedback for inbox processing steps.
- Settings UI updated with new toggles and notification level selector.
- Code refactoring for notification logic and media extraction skipping.

# 3.6.26 - Lightning Fast Organization

This release supercharges Note Companion's performance and responsiveness, especially for large vaults. Enjoy instant folder and tag suggestions, smarter AI prompts, and a smoother experience when organizing your notes. Behind the scenes, we've added advanced caching, debounced fetching, and optimized how suggestions are generated—making everything feel snappier and more reliable.

## Technical Changes
- Added in-memory caching for folder and tag suggestions to avoid redundant AI calls and speed up repeated actions.
- Introduced debounced fetching for organizer suggestions, reducing unnecessary API calls and improving UI responsiveness.
- Optimized tag and folder suggestion logic to cap the number of items sent to the AI, ensuring faster and more relevant results even in large vaults.
- Implemented cache invalidation on vault changes (create, delete, rename, or metadata updates) to keep suggestions accurate.
- Improved folder prioritization for AI prompts by preferring parent and shallow folders, making suggestions more context-aware.
- Added support for aborting in-flight API requests when switching notes or refreshing, preventing stale or overlapping results.
- Refactored organizer UI components to leverage new caching and debouncing hooks for a smoother user experience.
- Minor bug fixes and style improvements for better accessibility and consistency.
